narrative:
Clinton Twp township has 2,872 registered voters, with 50.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.0 percentage points.
